title: Phase 2: 5 个 service 层
notes: Lock service uses raw SQL for partial unique index support. Heartbeat uses check-then-upsert. SearchPlaybooks uses plainto_tsquery('simple'). StreamEvents polls every 1s via goroutine + channel.

title: 社区市场后端 Service 层
notes: InstallWorker uses pgx transaction (Begin/Commit/Rollback) wrapping 3 operations: insert hub_worker, import playbooks, increment install_count. ListCommunityWorkers uses raw SQL for dynamic filters (ILIKE search, domain, sort/pagination) + ent for final fetch. Deidentify covers file paths (Unix+Windows), URLs, IPs, API keys (sk-/Bearer).
